svg.aria-label: Figure 14 — Decision Interface Charter Meta-Pattern: the nine-field anatomy
svg.text: The Decision Interface Charter: One Shape, Many Seats
Every Charter declares the same nine fields. The fields are the constant; the seat is the variable.
THE SEATS · INSTANCES OF THE SAME SHAPE
Underlined seats (PM-Director, PMM, Value Realization) are written out as worked examples in this appendix.
The remaining four seats are built from the same nine-field template using the Derivation Kit recipe.
The seat fills them differently; it never changes the skeleton.
